problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Biomimetic. Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
